title: Subtle Font Tweaks
description: This subtle Minecraft font pack makes lowercase letters smaller and rounder and centers capitalized letters. They are minor changes with a fresh new feel.
body:
# Subtle Font Tweaks

Are you tired of the default Minecraft font but not looking for something completely different? This font pack makes small changes to the default font we've all been using for years.

- **Centered Capitals**: No more off-balance upper-case letters.
- **Rounder, Smaller Lowercase**: Lower case got a height adjustment and got its own minor tweaks
- **Subtle Adjustments**: ~ Other small things ~

Whether you’re looking for a minor refresh or something new, this font pack is for those who enjoy subtle vanilla changes.
